title: common: abort load on ENOSPC and output clear error
body:
Fix: https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/issues/26197

When loading images, exit archive checks when receiving ENOSPC error, and display a clearer exit message for the user.

comments.body: Opened this new PR to tidy up after the previous one

the CI failure needs to be addressed:

```
CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -tags "containers_image_openpgp,systemd" ./...
# go.podman.io/common/libimage
libimage/errno_windows.go:7:28: undefined: syscall.ERROR_DISK_FULL
make: *** [Makefile:37: build-cross] Error 1
Collecting logs
```
